title: CSS transform vs individual page scales mismatch
description: applyZoom applies single scale to container but pages may have different renderScale values

title: Different initial renderScale per page
description: renderPage() calculates scale per page differently. Pages may have different scales, causing skip in debouncedRerender

title: Zoom with 2 visible pages sometimes leaves one unrendered until scroll
description: When 2 pages are visible at once, zooming in or out sometimes doesn't render one of those pages until the user scrolls. Likely race condition in updateCachedPages or visibility detection during rerender.

title: Origin calculation scales viewport height incorrectly
description: adjustedOriginY scales innerHeight/2 by scaleRatio but viewport height doesn't change. Should use fresh viewport center after scroll adjustment.

title: Post-zoom jump when debounce fires
description: Transform-origin switches from viewport-center to top-center after rerender, causing big jump when cssZoom != 1.0

title: updateCachedPages draws at wrong scale
description: When scrolling to uncached pages, canvas drawn at pageView.renderScale which may differ from currentRenderScale

title: Coordinate system shift after dimension change
description: When page dimensions change in debouncedRerender, scroll and transform-origin still reference old coordinate system. Need to scale both by dimension ratio.

title: Zoom inconsistency across pages
description: When zooming then scrolling, some pages below initial set aren't zoomed. Scrolling to them allows individual zoom but document struggles overall.

title: Debounced rerender breaks zoom centering
description: After debouncedRerender updates page dimensions, applyZoom recalculates transform-origin causing visual jump. Need to use fixed origin after rerender since CSS scale is close to 1.0

title: Canvas-less pages skip rerender
description: debouncedRerender only redraws if canvas exists. Uncached pages get dimensions updated but no visual

title: Zoom scroll jitter and post-zoom displacement
description: Scroll adjustment during zoom caused jitter on each zoom step, plus a large correction after debounce completed. Fixed by using dynamic transform-origin at viewport center instead of scroll manipulation.

title: Animation stutter during rerender transition
description: Position is correct but visible stutter when transitioning from dynamic zoom to debounced rerender. Need to disable CSS transition during rerender.
